name: AREthProvidedEventGroupRemoveConsumer
title: AREthProvidedEventGroupRemoveConsumer
syntax: long AREthProvidedEventGroupRemoveConsumer(dword pevgHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort); // form 1
long AREthProvidedEventGroupRemoveConsumer(dword pevgHandle, byte remoteIPv6Address[], dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort); // form 2
description: Removes a consumer from a provided event group. Afterwards event/field notifications will not be sent to this consumer anymore.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Provided event group handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetProvidedObjectHandle).

parameters.name: remoteIPv4Address
parameters.description: IPv4 address of the consumer. In network byte order.

parameters.name: remoteUDPPort
parameters.description: An UDP port number of the consumer or zero if there is none.

parameters.name: remoteTCPPort
parameters.description: A TCP port number of the consumer or zero if there is none.

parameters.name: remoteIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the consumer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
